text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, I challenge you! You and me, on the
racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Can it wait till after I finish this pork bun? After
all...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pork buns should be eaten when they're still hot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course you should finish that first! Now hurry
up and eat it!
